title: Public archive recheck for A733 SDMMC0 IDMAC blocker
findings: Public search still surfaces the already-audited U-Boot A733 support series, not a Linux sunxi-mmc descriptor-fetch fix.
Search also surfaced vendor/downstream boot logs and forum material with A733/sun60iw2 MMC strings, but no source-backed SMHC0 IDMAC, firewall, NSI, MBUS, or security handoff delta.
No public reply/archive hit for the sent A733 SDMMC0 DESC_READ question was found in this pass.
decision: No build and no patch. Keep the blocker unchanged until maintainer/vendor feedback or a source-backed SDMMC0 IDMAC access-control clue appears.
next_action: Continue local firmware/source mining or check mail/list archives again later.
